chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1312 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on withdrawal statement dt:17.12.2020 2. For orders on office objections 3. For hearing of main case. 06.10.2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General. Mr. Adnan Arshad, Special Prosecutor NAB..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Lastly the petition was fixed on 13.08.2020, on such date same was the position, which reflects that the petitioner has no interest to proceed with the matter. Under the circumstances, instant petition is hereby dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
